title: The Gig Income Funding Predictor ("Giggle Finance")
problem: Need instant funding predictions based on app revenue without hard credit pulls.
promise: Turn need instant funding predictions based on app revenue without hard credit pulls. into a clear next step.

formula.label: Funding Readiness Score
formula.expression: weighted score from monthlyRevenue, creditScore, cashAvailable

outputs: Back on the Road Funding Score 5
benefits: Quantify the problem in plain language.
Give the visitor an immediate result.
Route high-intent leads into the next action.

sourceAsset.name: The Gig Income Funding Predictor ("Giggle Finance")
sourceAsset.problem: Need instant funding predictions based on app revenue without hard credit pulls. 5, 6
outputs: Back on the Road Funding Score 5
sourceAsset.coreLogic: Avg Weekly Earnings * 4, modified by a seniority factor (e.g., *1.2 for 2+ years). 5
